integrity_check\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["For programmatic health checks, use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_diagnose"}]," MCP tool, which returns database stats, table counts, and integrity status."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Metrics"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieve memory metrics via the CLI or MCP tool:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Global stats across all Hermes profiles\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n\n# Per-profile stats (run from a project directory or specify --profile)\nhermes mnemosyne stats\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_diagnose"}]," MCP tool returns structured metrics including:"]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad"}]," table counts"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Database size and integrity status"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Embedding model info"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Version info (3.4.0)"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Key Metrics"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Retrieve these with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne stats"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_diagnose"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"working_memory"}],": Items currently in active working memory (max controlled by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}],", default 10000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}],": Total consolidated episodes across all tiers"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"scratchpad"}],": Temporary in-flight entries during sleep/consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Database size"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"du -sh ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Last sleep / consolidation time"}],": Reported in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne stats"}]," output"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector index"}],": sqlite-vec virtual table (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_episodes"}],") for embedding search"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Logging"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses Python's standard ",["$","code",null,{"children":"logging"}]," module. To enable debug logging:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"import logging\nlogging.getLogger(\"mnemosyne\").setLevel(logging.DEBUG)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Log output includes component-level detail without requiring special configuration. Key loggers:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.beam"}]," — memory tiering, sleep/consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.embeddings"}]," — model loading and generation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.dr.recovery"}]," — backup and integrity checks"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Health Check Scripts"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For automated monitoring, use cron or a scheduled job that runs health checks:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"#!/bin/bash\n# mnemosyne-health-check.sh\nset -e\n\n# Integrity check\nsqlite3 ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db \\\n\"PRAGMA integrity_check\" | grep -q \"ok\" || exit 1\n\n# Check working memory hasn't overflowed\nhermes mnemosyne stats --json | python3 -c \"\nimport json, sys\nd = json.load(sys.stdin)\nif d['working_total'] > 9500:\n  sys.exit(1)\n\"\n\necho \"Mnemosyne health check passed\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n","$L4"],["$L5"],"$L6"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"avR8AX1ZmJ678HIyJzpPX"}
